Home/World of Warcraft/Classes/Mistweaver Monk/Additional Resources

Additional Resources for Mistweaver Monk — Midnight (12.0.1)

Last updated on Feb 26, 2026 at 01:00 by Dhaubbs 48 comments

On this page we will be helping you with additional resources for your Mistweaver Monk. This covers Add-on and WeakAura recommendations, Macros, Simulations, and some more esoteric knowledge of your spec!

Mistweaver Monk Guide
Leveling Easy Mode Builds and Talents Rotation, Cooldowns, and Abilities Stat Priority Gems, Enchants, and Consumables Gear and Best in Slot Spell List and Glossary DPS Guide Additional Resources
MISTWEAVER MONK ADDITIONAL RESOURCES
Addons & Macros How to Improve Simulations

Welcome to our additional resources page for Mistweaver Monk. Here you will find links to recommended third-party tools, guides that can help you reach the next level in your gameplay by teaching you how to sim yourself or analyze your own logs, as well as other information that can help you improve both your character and performance.

1.

How To Sim Yourself

Due to the nature of healing in general, it is effectively impossible to sim healers. Unlike DPS, whose goal is to simply deal as much damage to the boss as possible, healers instead aim to keep players alive. This means sometimes playing in sub-optimal ways in order to save a life. Equally, healing is a zero-sum game, in that if one person does exceptional HPS, the HPS of their co-healers will suffer as a result. These compounding factors, along with the randomness injected into the system by players interacting with their characters, makes simulating healers next to impossible.

Rather than using prescriptive tools like simulations, healers must instead depend on descriptive methods of post-fight analysis, such as QELive (by Voulk) and WoWAnalyzer (maintained by Vohrr and Trevor).

These tools are excellent for not only improving your minute to minute gameplay, but also determining how to optimally gear your character. If you would like to know how certain stats benefit your character, then checkout our Stats Guide.

Mistweaver Monk Stat Priority
1.

How to Analyze Logs

In order to help you further elevate your performance and improve your ability to self-analyze your gameplay, we are preparing a set of guides that teach you how to look at your own logs, find rotational issues, check for uptimes on buffs and debuffs, and much more. Please make sure to check back at a later time once these have been completed.

How to Analyze Logs Guide COMING SOON!
2.

Mistweaver Monk Mage Tower Challenge

The Mage Tower offers a unique solo challenge for every specialization to test themselves against, granting a unique transmog set and potential mount for those that succeed. If you are looking for guidance on the trial awaiting Mistweaver Monks, see our dedicated guide to it below.

Mistweaver Monk Mage Tower Guide
2.

Changelog

  • 26 Feb. 2026: Reviewed for Midnight Launch.
  • 10 Feb. 2026: Reviewed for Midnight Pre-Patch.
  • 30 Nov. 2025: Page created.
Show more
Show less

ABOUT THE AUTHOR

This guide has been written by Dhaubbs, a Mistweaver Monk theorycrafter, and founder of the once World 4th guild Big Dumb Guild (BDG) on Illidan-US. You can follow him on Twitter, Twitch, and YouTube.
